---
title: "Han-Teng Liao's CV"
author:
  firstname: Han-Teng
  lastname: Liao
  address: "Taipei and Penang"
  position: "Socio-Technical System Architect ・ Ex Associate Professor and Vice Dean"
  contacts:
    - icon: fa envelope
      text: Email
      url: "mailto:h.liao@ieee.org"
    - icon: assets/icon/bi-house-fill.svg
      text: Project
      url: https://osf.io/dpjyn
    - icon: fa brands orcid
      text: 0000-0003-1081-5599
      url: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1081-5599
    - icon: fa brands github
      text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/hanteng
    - icon: fa brands linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/han-teng-liao-b175b75/
    - icon: fa brands x-twitter
      text: twitter
      url: https://twitter.com/hanteng
format: awesomecv-typst
brand:
  typography: 
    fonts:
      - family: Roboto
        source: google
        weight: [100, 400, 700]
      - family: Source Sans 3
        source: google
        weight: [100, 400, 700]
        style: [normal, italic]
    base: Source Sans 3
  color:
    primary: "#002147"
    link: "#771822"
  defaults: 
    awesomecv-typst:
      font-header: Roboto
---


## Education

{{< yaml assets/yml/education.yml >}}

## Publications

{{< yaml assets/yml/publication.yml >}}

## Professional Service

{{< yaml assets/yml/service.yml >}}

## Work Experience

{{< yaml assets/yml/work.yml >}}

## Awards

{{< yaml assets/yml/award.yml >}}

## Skills

{{< yaml assets/yml/skill.yml >}}
